data.name: onboarding.welcome.title
data.comment: Translator: Heading on first-run onboarding page; appears as h1.

data.name: onboarding.welcome.detail
data.value: 로컬 워크스페이스를 설정하여 오프라인 우선 협업을 시작하세요.
data.comment: Translator: Body text under welcome title; full sentence about offline-first workspace.

data.name: onboarding.join-team.title
data.comment: Translator: Title on QR-onboarding page; imperative phrasing pairs with "Scan QR code" CTA.

data.name: onboarding.join-team.detail
data.value: 다른 팀원이 표시하는 QR 코드를 스캔하여 워크스페이스를 공유하세요.
data.comment: Translator: Body text on join-team page; describes QR-pairing flow per ADR 0032.

data.name: errors.network-unavailable
data.comment: Translator: Status — working offline. Neutral tone (offline is normal in Anchor).

data.name: errors.network-unavailable.detail
data.value: 변경 사항은 로컬에 저장되며 피어에 연결되면 동기화됩니다.
data.comment: Translator: Body text under offline status; reassures changes are saved locally.

data.name: errors.team-not-found
data.comment: Translator: Error shown when switching to a team that no longer exists in local registry.

data.name: errors.team-not-found.detail
data.value: 이 팀은 더 이상 이 디바이스에서 사용할 수 없습니다. 필요한 경우 QR 코드로 다시 참여하세요.
data.comment: Translator: Body text on team-not-found; suggests recovery via re-join QR.
